page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, utilizing Intel Xeon 8269CY processors running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation model ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing consistent execution times for multi-threaded workloads.

Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated physical cores, this server is designed for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded application hosting, and enterprise deployments requiring predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is a KVM-based x86_64 server instance configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by Intel Xeon 8269CY processors operating at 3.1 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, it delivers a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps, lacks local storage, and contains no GPUs. This hardware profile makes it highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads, multi-threaded applications, and compute-intensive tasks that require dedicated, non-shared CPU resources without hyperthreading interference.
